title: sterculia rhynchophylla
intro: Sterculia rhynchophylla, also known as the "Gutta tree" or "Water Apple tree", is a plant species in the Sterculiaceae family, native to tropical Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is believed to have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Sterculia rhynchophylla include reducing fever, relieving coughs and respiratory issues, and promoting digestive health. The plant is often prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture, and is also used in herbal infusions, capsule, or powder form.
